prompt: Create an authentic candid daily-life photograph in a realistic documentary style: a medium shot of two young women standing close together at a night market food stall at night, framed from the waist up from a direct frontal angle. The left woman is East Asian, early 20s, wearing an oversized pale cream crew-neck sweatshirt with a thin black shoulder bag strap and a small delicate necklace; her dark hair is loosely tied up with a few stray wisps. The right woman is African, early 20s, wearing a fitted dark brown long-sleeve scoop-neck top with a black shoulder bag strap and her natural curly hair gathered high into a puff bun. Both lean slightly toward each other, relaxed and unposed, looking downward at a small white paper food tray held between them; the left woman uses a toothpick or small skewer to pick up food while the right woman supports the tray with both hands. Their faces are deliberately covered by two solid opaque rectangular privacy blocks in brown tones, one over each face, matching their approximate skin tones. Behind them is a warmly lit night-market stall with glowing orange paper lanterns, glass display case, trays of fried street food, soft steam or haze, and blurred pedestrians and neon bokeh receding into the dark street. Use warm amber overhead stall lighting from above and behind the counter, strong natural highlights on clothing and hands, shallow depth of field, 35mm documentary photography feel, high ISO night realism, imperfect candid composition, no posing, no glamour styling, no text.
